Flux.guidance: Natural language paragraph (2-4 sentences). Focus on texture, lighting, and atmosphere. Describe the subject, then the environment. End with technical camera details.
Flux.label: Flux.1
Flux.negative_prompt: flat lighting, static, dull colors, artifacting, blur

SD3.guidance: Natural, conversational paragraph. Focus on prompt adherence and spatial relationships. Describe subject, action, and setting clearly. Mention text elements if any.
SD3.label: Stable Diffusion 3
SD3.negative_prompt: deformed, distorted, disfigured, bad anatomy, bad eyes

HiDream.guidance: Whimsical paragraph (3-4 sentences) with dreamlike qualities, textures, and fantastical details.
HiDream.label: HiDream
HiDream.negative_prompt: mundane, low detail, flat shadows, inconsistent perspective

Qwen.guidance: Semicolon-separated clauses: appearance; outfit; pose; environment; lighting; camera.
Qwen.label: Qwen
Qwen.negative_prompt: noise, bad hands, unbalanced composition, low detail

SD.guidance: Single line, comma-separated tags. Order: subject, outfit, pose, environment, lighting, camera, style.
SD.label: Stable Diffusion 1.x
SD.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, watermark

SDXL.guidance: Detailed descriptive paragraph (3-5 sentences). Structure: Subject visual details -> Outfit/Fashion -> Pose/Action -> Environment/Background -> Lighting/Atmosphere -> Camera/Film stock.
SDXL.label: Stable Diffusion XL
SDXL.negative_prompt: grainy, lowres, oversaturated, deformed, bad proportions, text artifacts

SDXL-Turbo.guidance: Two brisk imperative sentences. Line 1: subject + outfit + action. Line 2: environment + lighting + camera cue.
SDXL-Turbo.label: SDXL Turbo
SDXL-Turbo.negative_prompt: motion blur, mushy textures, low contrast, clip errors, warped limbs

Juggernaut.guidance: Photorealistic paragraph highlighting skin texture, fabric detail, lens type, and lighting falloff. Mention post-processing look.
Juggernaut.label: Juggernaut XL
Juggernaut.negative_prompt: plastic skin, cartoonish, dull eyes, blown highlights, harsh artifacts

RealVis.guidance: Structured tri-sentence format: (1) subject + wardrobe; (2) environment + atmosphere; (3) camera metadata + color grading.
RealVis.label: RealVis XL
RealVis.negative_prompt: uncanny valley, smeared textures, chromatic noise, awkward pose

WAN-T2V.label: WAN 2.2 Text-to-Video
WAN-T2V.guidance: Cinematic prose paragraph (80-200 words). Lead with subjects and their detailed appearance. Describe motion and physical behavior precisely (weight, speed, direction). Include how the environment evolves over the clip. Specify lighting quality (golden hour, neon, studio diffused). End with camera movement and shot type.
WAN-T2V.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, static, flat motion, jittery, inconsistent lighting, distorted faces

WAN-I2V.label: WAN 2.2 Image-to-Video
WAN-I2V.guidance: Cinematic prose paragraph (60-150 words). Begin by naming the visual style or mood. Describe what the existing subject does: motion, expression changes, interactions. Add environmental atmosphere (weather, light shift, ambient elements). Close with camera shot type and movement.
WAN-I2V.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, static image, no motion, jittery, distorted

LTX-T2V.label: LTX-Video Text-to-Video
LTX-T2V.guidance: Single flowing paragraph, chronological, under 200 words. Start DIRECTLY with the main action (no preamble). Follow this order: action, movements/gestures, character/object appearances, background/environment, camera angle/movement, lighting/colors, any changes during the clip. Literal and precise. Think like a cinematographer writing a shot list.
LTX-T2V.negative_prompt: worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted, floating limbs, temporal flickering

LTX-I2V.label: LTX-Video Image-to-Video
LTX-I2V.guidance: Single flowing paragraph, chronological, under 200 words. Start directly with what the existing subject begins doing. Specify exact movements, gestures, gaze direction, body shifts. Add environmental and ambient changes. State whether the camera holds or moves. Describe light and color throughout.
LTX-I2V.negative_prompt: worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted, static image, no movement
